texto: I got my first camera when I was 21 - my boyfriend gave it to me for my birthday - but at that point politics was my life, and I viewed the camera as a tool for expressing my political beliefs rather than as an art medium.
explicacao: Citação de Carrie Mae Weems sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I got my first camera when I was 21 - my boyfriend gave it to me for my birthday - but at that po…” articula amizade, vida, art em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e termino.

frase_original: I got my first camera when I was 21 - my boyfriend gave it to me for my birthday - but at that point politics was my life, and I viewed the camera as a tool for expressing my political beliefs rather than as an art medium.

texto: Sometimes you sacrifice too much. You find yourself out on a limb and not knowing really quite how to get back down the tree. But it’s the space that you’re in because you have taken the risk. I’m not unaware of the sacrifices and, at times, whom your compassion hurts. It’s not all moving in one direction. It’s complicated, as the work is complicated.
explicacao: Citação de Carrie Mae Weems sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes you sacrifice too much. You find yourself out on a limb and not knowing really quite ho…” articula reflexao, sacrifice, complicated em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.

seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Carrie Mae Weems sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes you sacrifice too much. You find yourself out on a limb and not knowing really q…

frase_original: Sometimes you sacrifice too much. You find yourself out on a limb and not knowing really quite how to get back down the tree. But it’s the space that you’re in because you have taken the risk. I’m not unaware of the sacrifices and, at times, whom your compassion hurts. It’s not all moving in one direction. It’s complicated, as the work is complicated.

texto: It's impossible to change the social without changing the personal - you have to put your money where your mouth is. And if you're not making those challenges at home, it's unlikely you'll make them in a larger setting.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Carrie Mae Weems sobre limites e escolhas conscientes.
